underlying_goal: Build and refine a Travel Planner Next.js app with proper layout, expense/destination editing, tab-based trip detail pages, and a clean home page UX
friction_detail: Claude had a quote escaping issue in the home page edit that required an immediate follow-up fix.
brief_summary: User iteratively refined a Travel Planner app across layout, editing features, expense tab flow, and home page UX, and Claude successfully implemented all requested changes across multiple files.
